display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Fishing and Adventure
programme.desc: It's an epic offshore adventure on the Kapiti coast as the challenge is set to land a trophy fish and hunt a trophy deer. The boys get dealt a classic Wellington weather bomb.

programme.title: Rural Delivery
programme.desc: Massey University investigates pasture species in regen ag; Fruit producers and workers alike harvest benefits of the RSE scheme; and Massey’s Horticulture Society grows opportunities for students.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: Wool Warrior: On a rugged northern Wairarapa farm, a woman continues her family tradition of growing top-quality wool and selling products made from it internationally.

programme.title: Dog Squad Puppy School
programme.desc: And a tough day at the office for Blind Low Vision dog Archie, Mobility pup Fletcher snuggles his way through his job, and which Corrections pup will come out on top, Bindi or Bart? S4 E8

programme.title: Tagata Pasifika
programme.desc: Tagata Pasifika is TVNZ's flagship Pacific news show, telling the stories of Pacific Islanders and its community. Made with the support of NZ on Air.

programme.title: Find My Country House Canada
programme.desc: Couples looking to relocate from the city find their perfect country house in a regional, Canadian location.

programme.title: John & Lisa's Weekend Kitchen
programme.desc: John and Lisa can't get enough of puff as they present four fabulous ways to use puff pastry that include an extra-special festive recipe that has been devised by Lisa.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Australia
programme.desc: Series Premiere: Rick Stein retraces his first steps in Sydney, reconnecting with old friends and exploring the exciting and ever-evolving nature of its culinary landscape. S1 E1

programme.title: Make It At Market
programme.desc: Looking to change their lives with the help of Dom and his team of mentors are former teacher and willow weaver Des and stained-glass artist Emily.

programme.title: The Travelling Auctioneers
programme.desc: Research, restore and ready for sale! An intrepid team of antiques experts and master crafters help families turn unwanted items into winning lots.

programme.title: Highway Cops
programme.desc: This time on Highway Cops: A tractor roll-over requires an urgent helivac, then flooding hits the Tasman region and travellers get cut off by the rising waters.

programme.title: Lingo
programme.desc: Quiz show hosted by Adil Ray in which three pairs of contestants use their powers of deduction to work out words that appear in the Lingo grids and Puzzlewords.

programme.title: Hard Quiz
programme.desc: Tom Gleeson is back with a fresh batch of experts to compete for the Big Brass Mug. This week’s #HardQuiz topics: Spartacus, TV Series Glee, Penguins and the Trump Presidency!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing! Hosted by Bradley Walsh.

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Britain's Got Talent
programme.desc: The auditions continue as further acts take to the stage with performances to impress the crowd and judges as they try to win themselves a coveted space in the semi-finals.

programme.title: Lotto
programme.desc: Takashi Sorimachi stars as Satoru Tachibana, an advertising firm employee slaving away under a younger boss for a meager salary. With a pachinko habit, no savings, and no prospects of romance since his divorce, Tachibana is left wondering what the future holds for him. One day, he desperately enters a lottery, trying to make enough money to pay for his child support, but his sense of self-disgust

programme.title: Britain's Got Talent Continued
programme.desc: The auditions continue as further acts take to the stage with performances to impress the crowd and judges as they try to win themselves a coveted space in the semi-finals.

programme.title: Faking It
programme.desc: Series Premiere: In each episode, a brave volunteer has just four weeks to master a new skill and convince experts judges that they are the real deal. S1 E1

programme.title: The Walsh Sisters
programme.desc: Series Premiere: Five sisters navigate the complexities of womanhood and family relationships as they learn to confront their past. S1 E1

programme.title: Moving Houses
programme.desc: After Cyclone Gabrielle, Alicia, Damien, and their boys count on the Randalls to move a relocatable home from Auckland to Gisborne, navigating the twisty Waioeka Gorge and busy roads full of trucks.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Olympia and Matty each put together their own collateral for Julian, hoping to regain his trust after he makes a shocking discovery; an injunction case takes a turn when their client is detained. S2E9

programme.title: Critical Incident
programme.desc: Dalia looks to drug dealer Ty for advice on how to fight the system; station pariah Zil, almost undone by some damning evidence, seeks a moment of comfort in an illicit kiss. S1 E3

programme.title: The Au Pair
programme.desc: Tensions at a birthday party reach boiling point, leading to an injury and shocking revelations; Amber begins to question Sandrine's true intentions, setting her on a dangerous path. S1 E2

programme.title: Chateau DIY at Christmas
programme.desc: Tim and Krys plan a festive feast, cooking a whole goose over an open fire. While Rebecca goes all out for Christmas, Tim is feeling far from festive.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Rural Delivery
programme.desc: Massey University investigates pasture species in regen ag; Fruit producers and workers alike harvest benefits of the RSE scheme; and Massey’s Horticulture Society grows opportunities for students.

programme.title: Barkley Manor
programme.desc: Portia the ageing Shih Tsu dons her best dress for the Barkley Manor VIP Room. Plus, Reggie the staffie pup goes on a rampage and an anxious Labradoodle face her greatest fear. S1 E6

programme.title: Tagata Pasifika
programme.desc: Tagata Pasifika is TVNZ's flagship Pacific news show, telling the stories of Pacific Islanders and its community. Made with the support of NZ on Air.

programme.title: Songs Of Praise
programme.desc: Inspiring hymns and songs, together with uplifting stories of faith from around the UK and beyond.

programme.title: Susan Calman's Grand Day Out
programme.desc: Susan and her campervan Helen are heading back to an old favourite, Yorkshire. She finds that the dales and moors contain a few unexplored spots and a few surprises that are a joy to discover.

programme.title: Q+A With Jack Tame
programme.desc: Hosted by Jack Tame, Q+A brings viewers the important political interviews and discussions of the week, taking a close look at politics, economics, and global events.

programme.title: Waka Huia
programme.desc: Waka Huia is an iconic archival documentary series recording the unique stories and histories of Maori for all New Zealanders.

programme.title: Marae
programme.desc: Your way in to the Māori world and the issues that matter. Māiatanga, Whanaungatanga, Manaakitanga - We bring you stories with heart.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off Extra Slice
programme.desc: Prue Leith, Oti Mabuse and Jon Richardson enjoy the last slice of the series. Which baker took their French delights to dizzy new heights? And whose biggest cake in history took showstopping victory?

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Loveable rogues the Boswells get into more sticky situations in the top-rated sitcom from the mind of Carla Lane. Oswald breaks off his engagement to Aveline.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Loveable rogues the Boswells in the top-rated sitcom from the mind of Carla Lane. Mrs Boswell goes for a trip in Derek's boat and catches Freddie and Lilo Lill misbehaving.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Friendly faces and some serious scrapes in the much-loved Liverpudlian sitcom. Adrian meets Ellia and they go to the woods where, to the family's amusement, she steals his clothes.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: More fun with the family fighting to put some money on the table in 1980s Liverpool. Adrian is arrested while riding his bicycle. The family decide to keep a secret from Pa Boswell.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: A very special edition of the smash hit Liverpudlian sitcom featuring Paul and Linda McCartney playing themselves.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Loveable rogues the Boswells get into more sticky situations in the top-rated sitcom from the mind of Carla Lane. Adrian has his poems published and buys the family gifts.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Loveable rogues the Boswells get into more sticky situations in the top-rated sitcom from the mind of Carla Lane. Oswald breaks off his engagement to Aveline.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Loveable rogues the Boswells in the top-rated sitcom from the mind of Carla Lane. Mrs Boswell goes for a trip in Derek's boat and catches Freddie and Lilo Lill misbehaving.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Friendly faces and some serious scrapes in the much-loved Liverpudlian sitcom. Adrian meets Ellia and they go to the woods where, to the family's amusement, she steals his clothes.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: More fun with the family fighting to put some money on the table in 1980s Liverpool. Adrian is arrested while riding his bicycle. The family decide to keep a secret from Pa Boswell.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: A very special edition of the smash hit Liverpudlian sitcom featuring Paul and Linda McCartney playing themselves.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Loveable rogues the Boswells get into more sticky situations in the top-rated sitcom from the mind of Carla Lane. Adrian has his poems published and buys the family gifts.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Loveable rogues the Boswells get into more sticky situations in the top-rated sitcom from the mind of Carla Lane. Oswald breaks off his engagement to Aveline.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Loveable rogues the Boswells in the top-rated sitcom from the mind of Carla Lane. Mrs Boswell goes for a trip in Derek's boat and catches Freddie and Lilo Lill misbehaving.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Friendly faces and some serious scrapes in the much-loved Liverpudlian sitcom. Adrian meets Ellia and they go to the woods where, to the family's amusement, she steals his clothes.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: More fun with the family fighting to put some money on the table in 1980s Liverpool. Adrian is arrested while riding his bicycle. The family decide to keep a secret from Pa Boswell.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: A very special edition of the smash hit Liverpudlian sitcom featuring Paul and Linda McCartney playing themselves.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Loveable rogues the Boswells get into more sticky situations in the top-rated sitcom from the mind of Carla Lane. Adrian has his poems published and buys the family gifts.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring Old Byron Hot Springs in the Californian desert - a once glittering Hollywood hotspot, converted into a top-secret interrogation centre.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A symbol of national pride that became a symbol of excess in the Turkish capital of Ankara.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring Yongma Land - a South Korean dreamland given a second life from the most unlikely of places.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring Old Joliet Prison, a battered facility near Chicago that descended into open war, but then hosted the Blues Brothers.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring Old Byron Hot Springs in the Californian desert - a once glittering Hollywood hotspot, converted into a top-secret interrogation centre.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A symbol of national pride that became a symbol of excess in the Turkish capital of Ankara.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring Yongma Land - a South Korean dreamland given a second life from the most unlikely of places.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring Old Joliet Prison, a battered facility near Chicago that descended into open war, but then hosted the Blues Brothers.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads? New
programme.desc: Rodney Bewes and James Bolam play chalk and cheese mates Bob and Terry in this 70s sitcom. Feeling nostalgic, the lads decide to chat up two women at a restaurant.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads? New
programme.desc: Iconic 1970s sitcom with James Bolam and Rodney Bewes. Mrs Chambers has grandiose plans for Thelma's wedding to Bob. But stirred up by Terry's ridicule, the men rebel.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads? New
programme.desc: 70s sitcom sequel from arguably Britain's finest comedy scribes - Clement and La Frenais. To Terry's dismay, Bob scorns the stag night tradition of drunken revelry. S1 Ep.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads? New
programme.desc: The classic sitcom about two ill-matched friends. 'Those whom God hath joined together let no man put asunder' - does that include Terry Collier.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads? New
programme.desc: 1970s comedy at its finest. Bob and Thelma begin their married life with a Norwegian honeymoon - far away from Terry's destructive influence.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Rodney Bewes and James Bolam play chalk and cheese mates Bob and Terry in this 70s sitcom. Feeling nostalgic, the lads decide to chat up two women at a restaurant.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Iconic 1970s sitcom with James Bolam and Rodney Bewes. Mrs Chambers has grandiose plans for Thelma's wedding to Bob. But stirred up by Terry's ridicule, the men rebel.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: 70s sitcom sequel from arguably Britain's finest comedy scribes - Clement and La Frenais. To Terry's dismay, Bob scorns the stag night tradition of drunken revelry.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: The classic sitcom about two ill-matched friends. 'Those whom God hath joined together let no man put asunder' - does that include Terry Collier.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Crime drama. The body of a man is found in a sportscar he was supposed to deliver to a diplomat. Was he the target or a victim of mistaken identity.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A blind woman dies live on stage while being treated by a faith healer - and when it turns out she has been poisoned, all eyes turn to the man's cup of holy water.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A lottery winner is found dead at her villa, much to the horror of her husband and their visiting friends. But the mystery deepens when the victim's body vanishes..

programme.title: Allegiance
programme.desc: As Sabrina waits for the axe to fall on her career, she must do everything in her power to keep a troubled teen caught in a bloody gang conflict from becoming a killer.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The Fall of the House of St Gardner: A gossip columnist is murdered after threatening to expose the secrets of a fashion house.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A blind woman dies live on stage while being treated by a faith healer - and when it turns out she has been poisoned, all eyes turn to the man's cup of holy water.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: The Major Crimes team is forced to turn against Jesse when he becomes the prime suspect in a bank robbery.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A celebrated Toronto industrialist and philanthropist dies after being struck on the back of the head. Drama, starring Yannick Bisson and Helene Joy.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A hospital is terrorised by a hooded and robed figure with a crossbow, who is exacting revenge on medics he apparently believes responsible of malpractice.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: After a strange telegraph is intercepted, Murdoch and Ogden are awoken by their old associate, Terence Meyers, who believes James Pendrick sent the message for Murdoch.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: After the electrocuted body of a man is found, Murdoch and Brackenreid investigate a pair of researchers known as 'The Frankensteins' for their bizarre psychological studies.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch and Ogden's weekend at a country inn goes awry when a guest is murdered.

programme.title: Miss Scarlet and the Duke
programme.desc: The unscrupulous boss of a new telecom company is accused of murder and wants Eliza and Nash to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Miss Scarlet and the Duke
programme.desc: Eliza is on the trail of a fugitive who is charged with murder, and must find him before the police do or she risks losing everything.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A lottery winner is found dead at her villa, much to the horror of her husband and their visiting friends. But the mystery deepens when the victim's body vanishes..

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The sleuthing priest is asked to look after Lady Felicia's wayward niece Bunty, who soon finds herself suspected of murder.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Period drama series. Father Brown struggles to promote understanding when a group of pagans are suspected of killing one of their own.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: After suspicious circumstances surround the death of a local fighter, Father Brown is drawn into the shady world of boxing to try and uncover the truth.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Series with GK Chesterton's spiritual sleuth. When a local writer is murdered, Father Brown must delve into her infamous novel Lulu and Lucia for inspiration.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A lottery winner is found dead at her villa, much to the horror of her husband and their visiting friends. But the mystery deepens when the victim's body vanishes..

programme.title: Saint-Pierre
programme.desc: With A Little Help from My Friends: When the severed finger of a handyman mysteriously turns up, Fitz and Arch's investigation turns into a case of vigilante justice.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: A death on a survival show's live broadcast uncovers murder disguised as a bear attack, and the team must set up a televised trap to catch the killer.

programme.title: Allegiance
programme.desc: As Sabrina waits for the axe to fall on her career, she must do everything in her power to keep a troubled teen caught in a bloody gang conflict from becoming a killer.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A sandfly bite lands Neville in the hospital, and despite being advised to rest, his detective instincts take over when a nurse takes her own life during a night shift.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Drama series with the curious cleric. When Mrs McCarthy takes over the running of the mobile library, Father Brown discovers a shocking secret.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: When Shirley's dad loses his job, Wolfie is determined to win it back - along with the old man's favour. However, nothing ever goes to plan in a Wolfie Smith campaign. S2 E.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Wolfie and the Tooting Popular Front find themselves terrified by local criminal Fenning over an issue of stolen stereos.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Wolfie is shell-shocked to be given a job despite his best efforts otherwise, but Dad is delighted that Yeti is joining the honest working classes.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Up for auction this week is a 1980 Ford Escort, a hand-built 1946 Bedford 12 electric car, and a beautiful, red 1957 Austin Healey.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek collects a beautifully restored and carefully modified 1936 Wolseley 14/56. Meanwhile, a Batman-inspired Chrysler Crossfire is dropped off at the Thornton le Dale garage.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: There's a surprise waiting for Derek in Hull - a MGSA sports car that once had a tree growing through it. In North Wales, Alan Holmes is selling his son's Ford Escort RS 1600i.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: On the south coast, Henry Cole gets to work an aircraft fuel tank, while Simon O'Brien becomes obsessed with a 1960s speedboat.

programme.title: Speed with Guy Martin
programme.desc: The inside story of the motoring fan's attempt to break the motorcycle land speed record - can he become the first man to do 400 miles per hour on a motorcycle.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Our Guy in Colombia
programme.desc: Guy Martin's Colombian adventure takes in some gravity racing on souped-up bikes, a dive into a narco-submarine, and a cup of very special 'tea'.

programme.title: Our Guy in China
programme.desc: Guy Martin builds his own electric motorbike in a factory in Chongqing before visiting the world's biggest public toilet and heading along the Yangtze towards Shanghai.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Gus and Will seek a Scandinavian car and settle on a Saab. They'd prefer a classic 99, but can only find an older 99 that was bought for a rally but can't go the distance.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Gus and Will set out to buy a Honda-based Rover 800 coupe. At only 650 pounds it seems too good to be true - and when they turn up, they aren't sure whether to proceed.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Gus has his eye on a Citroen XM that looks amazing - but it's in France. Will isn't sure, but the engineering challenges win him over.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Gus and Will find an Audi Quattro roadster than has seen better days - it's full of problems, and hasn't been serviced in years. Even so, they are intent on renovating it.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Will and Gus head to London to buy a '73 Mk 4 Spitfire. It seems solid, but how it fares on the road remains to be seen.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Will and Gus look to make some quick cash as they fix and wrap a Toyota MR2 MK2. It's quick and it's cheap, but it's the lowest spec out there and it looks dowdy.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie helps rescue a runaway narrowboat on the scenic Macclesfield Canal and cruises through autumn scenery toward Congleton to see a shipwreck up for sale.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Fallen trees block Robbie's journey on the Peak Forest Canal. Later, he meets TV host Terry Christian, whose dad once worked a local waterway.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie visits a former Beatle's home in Henley, uncovers horror history in Marlow and struggles to find a mooring in Maidenhead on the River Thames.

programme.title: The Lakes with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve explores the beautiful and unique landscapes of the Lake District, beginning by meeting Cumbrians with different visions for its future.

programme.title: The Lakes with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve explores the impact of humans on the Lake District, discovering the high number of visitors to Scafell Pike is damaging the mountain and stretching rescue resources.

programme.title: The Lakes with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve comes to the end of his travels by exploring the rugged coast of Cumbria and learning how central the county is to many challenges facing Britain.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team take on one of Derek's favourites - an Austin A35 - but its age ensures some hefty bills. To bank some cash, their second project is a quick flip - a 1999 BMW Z3.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Paul hits the road to collect an old navy ambulance that served its time as a holiday camper.

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: The A4 LNER Pacific Locomotive Sir Nigel Gresley must be hauled 46 miles at 30mph from Crewe to Bridgnorth.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: In the 100th episode, Derek heads to Northumberland to collect a rare 1975 NSU RO 80, Jack deals with a Mini Mayfair stuck in a barn, and an Aston Martin DBS husk is auctione.

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: Maddie, an adventurous youngster who happens to be visually impaired, sets out with her best doggy friend Triggs to discover the music and adventure in the sounds of the world around them.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Mischief In Sherwood
programme.desc: Sherwood is in danger from the tyrannical Prince John! Teenage Robin and his merry band of outlaws fight back.

programme.title: Smarty Pants
programme.desc: Tired of being the "losers" in class, three buddies are on a mission to become cool - realising along the way that just accepting themselves is the coolest way to be.

programme.title: Ninjago Masters Of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When two evil brothers manipulate the past and future to control all of Ninjago, the ninjas must retrieve the lost time blades to stop them.

programme.title: Beyblade X
programme.desc: Four beybladers and their genius friend travel the world as team 'Bladebreakers' to win a championship, realising there's much more at stake on the go.

programme.title: Transformers: Earthspark
programme.desc: After the end of the Transformers' war, the Malto family moves to Witwicky, Pennsylvania, to start a new life but their lives soon get entangled with a group of Terran Transformers.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran anxiously anticipates a big party on her first anniversary with the Sheffields. S2 E5

programme.title: Fresh
programme.desc: With FIFA World Cup fever hitting the globe, Niuean footballer Jaylen Rodwell takes us into his world, while musician Jarna creates a fresh beat inspired by her Glen Innes neighbourhood.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Chris can't help himself.

programme.title: School Spirits
programme.desc: Amongst the sparkly lights of Split River’s Homecoming Dance, Operation Find Maddie’s Killer goes into overdrive leading to surprising revelations. S1 E6

programme.title: Farm To Fork
programme.desc: Farm to Fork takes you on a journey across Australia, showcasing fresh local produce to inspire healthy cooking. Discover where your food comes from, support local farmers, and learn how to eat well.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Allie's lifestyle is ruined by the gumball-sized bump above her eye; Andrew's psoriasis and multiple body bumps have held him back from starting a family.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: Colette agrees to oversee Ceci's grandmother's driving test to win her approval, only to discover Ceci's request to fail her is far more personal. S1 E18

programme.title: Netball
programme.desc: Live coverage of the opening match of the final round in the 2026 ANZ Premiership season as the Stars host the Pulse from Pulman Arena in Auckland.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Can Bernadette trust Penny to keep a secret? And Penny accidentally lets slip about Bernadette's pregnancy to their co-workers. S10 E2

programme.title: Netball
programme.desc: Live coverage of the second match of the final round in the 2026 ANZ Premiership season as the Mystics take on the Magic from Trusts Arena in Auckland.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation Of Smaug
programme.desc: The dwarves, along with Bilbo Baggins and Gandalf the Grey, continue their quest to reclaim the Lonely Mountain, their homeland, from the dragon Smaug. Stars Ian McKellen. (2013)

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: A series of unusual events peaks with Kumail Nanjiani’s revelation about his nipples.

programme.title: American Princess
programme.desc: When rain washes out the festival day, Amanda and David get to know each other better. Meanwhile, Maggie revels in Amanda’s failures, Brian wallows in his heartbreak. S1 E7

programme.title: Fight Night: The Million Dollar Heist
programme.desc: Detective Hudson and Chicken Man travel to the Georgia Coast while tracking the robbers. S1 E7

programme.title: Vampire Academy
programme.desc: Rose and Lissa's quest for answers leads them beyond the borders of the world they've always known. Victor makes a final, desperate push for the throne. S1 E7

programme.title: Fallen
programme.desc: Miss Miriam hunts the Outcast while Howson fights to save Daniel; Luce and the others try to escape, but the creature pursues them; Luce learns who betrayed them to Howson and why. S1 E6

programme.title: Fresh
programme.desc: With FIFA World Cup fever hitting the globe, Niuean footballer Jaylen Rodwell takes us into his world, while musician Jarna creates a fresh beat inspired by her Glen Innes neighbourhood.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: This New Zealand-made animation sees the Tākaro Tribe on a learning adventure in Te Wao Arapū (the magical Alphabet Forest), along with Pāpā Rākau (Tree father) and Kōkā (Pond Mother).

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.desc: Elmo, Cookie Monster, and Abby Cadabby are robot heroes-in-training who use their STEM superpowers to solve wacky larger-than-life problems.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Meet Bluey, an inexhaustible six-year-old Blue Heeler dog who loves to play. She turns everyday family life into extraordinary adventures!

programme.title: Night Eyes
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of four film crews in their investigations of the various paranormal events that occur in their local area and their mission to help the locals deal with their ghostly problems.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir
programme.desc: Marinette and Adrien look like regular teenagers, usually. But together they are Ladybug and Cat Noir, the heroes that protect Paris from the evil Hawk Moth!

programme.title: Animaniacs
programme.desc: They're back! The Warner brothers, Yakko and Wakko, and the Warner sister Dot — three inseparable, irascible siblings — have a great time wreaking havoc and mayhem in the lives of everyone they me

programme.title: Island of Mystery
programme.desc: Josh and his dog crash back 700 years in time, to a mysterious land where taniwhas roam and ancient warriors rule.

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: They're young, passionate and all putting in the hard yards to become NZ's best young riders. Follow the group of friends and their horses throughout the competition season.

programme.title: What Now?
programme.desc: Come and join the party! Catch Aashma, Imy, Manu and Rahil for gunge, cream pies, challenges, prizes and adventures across Aotearoa! Haere mai ki te whare o te hūwareware!

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran is mistakenly accused of kidnapping a baby. S2 E6

programme.title: The Voice U.S.A
programme.desc: Michael Bublé, Snoop Dogg, Niall Horan and Reba McEntire each pair two artists to perform solo against each other, then select a winner to move on to the playoffs.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Eden has second thoughts. Dana and Alf work together. Is Justin in danger?

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Jo makes a drunken dial. Eden confides in Tane. A crime wave hits Summer Bay.
